name: stellar-commerce-contract
description: StellarCommerce - Non-custodial escrow payment system on Stellar

scripts.build:contract: cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && soroban contract optimize --wasm target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/escrow.wasm
scripts.build:sdk: cd sdk && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:cli: cd cli && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:contract && npm run build:sdk && npm run build:cli && npm run build:frontend

author: Markadrian6399
